sections.paragraph:
m. capture, being taken, Pro 3:26.

I. לְכָה imp. of the verb יָלֵךְ, with ה parag. go, depart, Num 10:29. It becomes a part. of exciting, age, go to, come now, Gen 31:44, even when women are addressed, Gen 19:32, for לְכִי, in pl. לְכוּ agite, Gen 37:20 1Sa 9:9 Isa 2:3, . The sing. is also written לְךָ, Num 23:13 Jud. 19:13 2Ch 25:17.

II. לְכָה for לְךָ to thee, Gen 27:37.
